query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS payments (
  id int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id int NOT NULL,
  subscription_id int NULL,
  quote_id int NULL,
  amount_in_cents int NOT NULL,
  currency varchar(3) DEFAULT 'AUD' NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('pending', 'completed', 'failed', 'refunded') DEFAULT 'pending' NOT NULL,
  payment_method ENUM('card', 'paypal', 'bank_transfer') DEFAULT 'card' NOT NULL,
  stripe_payment_intent_id varchar(255),
  stripe_charge_id varchar(255),
  receipt_url text,
  receipt_number varchar(64),
  refunded_at timestamp NULL,
  refund_reason text,
  created_at timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updated_at timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX payments_user_id_idx (user_id),
  INDEX payments_subscription_id_idx (subscription_id),
  INDEX payments_status_idx (status)
)
command:

  stripe_payment_intent_id varchar(255),
  stripe_charge_id varchar(255),
  receipt_url text,
  receipt_number varchar(64),
  refunded_at timestamp NULL,
  refund_reason text,
  created_at timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updated_at timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX payments_user_id_idx (user_id),
  INDEX payments_subscription_id_idx (subscription_id),
  INDEX payments_status_idx (status)
)
